WE VACATE THE PORTION OF THE SECTION 1203.1 ADMINISTRATIVE FEE THAT REMAINS UNPAID AS OF JANUARY 1, 2022.  WE REMAND TO THE TRIAL COURT FOR RESENTENCING TO ALLOW THE TRIAL COURT TO EXERCISE THE DISCRETION CONFERRED ON IT BY ASSEMBLY BILL 518.  IN ALL OTHER RESPECTS, THE JUDGMENT IS AFFIRMED.
